ab: Nga’ayho kita mapolong, keriden no singsi kita anini a miliso’ to kalas no niyaro’.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Tada manga’ay! Sano ’Amisen ita ko mato’asay.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說阿美語。

en: A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Mafana’ kamo tono ’Amis a caciyaw. A! tadamanga’ay.
ch: B:你們會說阿美語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:You speak Pangcah! That’s great!

ab: Nga’ayho kita mapolong, keriden no singsi kita anini a tayra i pisalamloan a omah.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: Pisarayarayto kita, haratengen ko hahawikiden a sakatayal.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Hai, singsi, matatoyto niyam ko sakatayal.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.
A: You go get the bird catcher.
B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Nga’ayho kita mapolong, tayra kita i pa^coan anini.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Misarayaray kita, mami’aca kita to paya.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: O pa’ayaman koni ka’ayaway, o pa’onelan kona ’aikoray, paytemek han ita a minengen.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Mamaan aca, ka pinengen kiso to ’ayam.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: I ikor no cecay a tatokian i, patikor kita a masa’opo.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.

ab: O maan ko ma’araw iso anini ?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Ma’araw ako ko adihayaya a ’onel, iraho ko adihayay a ’ayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Talaen kako, rarima ko wa’ay ako.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!
A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Talolong ko nanom itira, itini to kita a midangoy.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
